issues.title: Incorrect revenue calculation
issues.problem: The query does not filter transactions by status 'COMPLETED' to calculate revenue.

issues.title: Missing join with dim_merchant
issues.problem: The query should join with dim_merchant to get merchant names instead of showing merchant IDs.

issues.title: Potential performance issue with correlated subquery
issues.problem: Using correlated subqueries can lead to performance issues. It's better to use a single query with conditional aggregation.
issues.fix: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS failure_rate FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining the logic, which makes it harder to understand.
issues.fix: Add comments explaining the purpose of each part of the query.

review.corrected_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS revenue, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS failure_rate FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions JOIN sigma_analytics.dim_merchant ON sigma_analytics.fact_transactions.merchant_id = sigma_analytics.dim_merchant.merchant_id
review.summary: The query had issues with revenue calculation, missing join with dim_merchant, potential performance issues, and readability.
